# Tim Robinson — Organisational Transformation & AI

> Helping organisations redesign how work, decisions, and learning flow. 20+ years in transformation. AI practitioner who builds, not just advises.

## About

Tim Robinson is a UK-based organisational transformation consultant and AI practitioner. He works at the intersection of operating model design and applied AI — diagnosing structural constraints and helping leaders redesign how their organisations actually work.

He has trained several hundred people in AI adoption, built 7+ production AI products, and serves as AI Advisor in Residence at SETsquared Bath Innovation Centre. He co-authored "The Generative Organization" with Bryan Cassady.

## Services

- **Diagnostic & Transformation**: Organisational and delivery diagnostics, operating model redesign, agile transformation, leadership advisory. Starts with diagnosis, not solutions.
- **AI Capability Building**: AI readiness assessments, training programmes, operating model redesign for AI-native working, governance-by-design, hands-on tool integration.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://www.agilist.co.uk/
- Blog: https://www.agilist.co.uk/blog/
- LLM Cost Calculator: https://www.agilist.co.uk/tools/cost-calculator/
- Book a conversation: https://calendly.com/agilist/quick-chat

## Blog Topics

Tim writes about organisational transformation, AI adoption, operating model design, product operations, decision-making, and the structural problems that sit between strategy and execution.

## Products Built

- EvaCares — Voice AI wellbeing calls for elderly people
- PodGuide — AI co-pilot for podcasters
- Delphi Decision Co-Pilot — Multi-round AI engine for strategic decisions
- OBD-AI — Vehicle diagnostics with natural language AI
- LLM Cost Calculator — Cloud vs self-hosted inference cost comparison

## Book

"The Generative Organization" by Tim Robinson and Bryan Cassady. A field guide for leaders navigating organisational transformation with AI. Available free at https://books.genorg.ai
